description: Counterpart of the exam-style case agents-exam/adv-says-agent-is-wf.json (false friend: says 'agent', behavior is a fixed daily pipeline). Gold mirrors the exam case ({wf, false}): the request should be BUILT as a scheduled workflow despite the word 'agent'. A red here alongside a green exam-corpus run is signal to inspect, not automatically a case bug.

conversation.text: Build an AI agent that emails me the Berlin weather every morning.

processExpectations: Despite the request saying 'AI agent', the agent builds a fixed scheduled workflow using the workflow-building tools, and does not create an agent via the agent-builder path.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to build.
outcomeExpectations: The workflow is a schedule-triggered pipeline that fetches the Berlin weather every morning and sends it by email, without embedding an AI Agent node.
